ddls:
CREATE TABLE "forecast_data" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast data entry */,
  "forecast_cases" REAL /* Forecasted number of disease cases */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the forecast */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the forecast */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model used */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the forecast is for */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was made */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease the forecast is for */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., short-term, long-term) */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Range of values for the forecast */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "true_data" (
  "true_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each true data entry */,
  "true_cases" INTEGER /* Actual number of disease cases */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the data is for */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease the true data is for */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., confirmed cases, deaths, recoveries) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the true data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("true_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_true_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_true_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_metrics" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error metric entry */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast data entry */,
  "true_id" INTEGER /* ID of the true data entry */,
  "error_value" REAL /* Value of the error metric */,
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the error metric type */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date when the error metric was calculated */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease the error metric is for */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the error metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_metrics_true_id FOREIGN KEY ("true_id") REFERENCES true_data ("true_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_metrics_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecast_data ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_metrics_metric_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_type_id") REFERENCES metric_types ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the forecasting model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "model_version" INTEGER /* Version of the model */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the region is in */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, research institution) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_types" (
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error metric type */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the error metric type */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the error metric type */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the error metric */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the metric type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., epidemiologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed (forecast_id or true_id) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES forecast_data ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES true_data ("true_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast version */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the forecast */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease the forecast version is for */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the forecast version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_versions_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecast_data ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "true_data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each true data version */,
  "true_id" INTEGER /* ID of the true data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the true data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease the true data version is for */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the true data version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_true_data_versions_true_id FOREIGN KEY ("true_id") REFERENCES true_data ("true_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease the model version is for */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
